content: I came up this team when I was noodling around and can't decide if I want to use wheels/key that lean more toward shield or counter. This team can stack counter pretty fast so Caecus could be dangerous but I know Sanga's Exalt is insane and this team can definitely stack shield. Any opinions before I start burning materials?

One-core team will be more easier than two-core or even three-core, all of Caecus, Sanga and Wanda is the core char, pretty not put them together except for you treat two of them like sup - less important and resources dedicated.
If you don't know how to pick your core, decide based on the wheels you have.
- If you have more strong attack wheels, or have a high stack 'Falling sun', 'Queen's decree', then Wanda is the core;
- If you have more sigil drop wheels, or have a high stack 'Aching fin', then Caecus is the core
- If you have more death resistance wheels, or have a high stack 'Steadfast', then Sanga is the core

If you treat Caecus as a sup, give him wheels that can increase healing and shield.
And if it's Wanda, then what can increase shield and any R wheels about d-mark.
If it's Sanga, then what can increase shield and R wheels about surviving.
